Dry Bulk Shipping
November 7, 2023
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 1,098 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 1,462 Short-term Indicators:
↓ 30D: -30.6% ↓ 30D: -17.9% Momentum: Negative
↑ YTD: 7.6% ↓ YTD: -8.6% Sentiment: Negative
↑ YOY: 4.6% ↑ YOY: 7.4% Fundamentals: Neutral
Bi-Weekly Report
• Shipping volatility is your friend… most of the time - Once again, the Capesize market has proven what shipping is
all about: Uncorrelated volatility. With spot rates doubling in a period of a month reaching north of 30,000, a harsh
correction brought rates back to the 15,000 level in less than two weeks followed by a sharp bounce in the last few
days. Although such volatility is a characteristic of the spot market, futures only focus on averages (freight futures
